If I contribute x tokens, I get back (1.5x)/3 = 0.5x, losing 0.5x tokens. With others contributing 0, my best response is to contribute 0 and keep all 5 tokens.

Contributing my tokens would give me less return than keeping them, since each token I contribute only returns 0.5 tokens to me. The dominant strategy here is to free-ride and keep all 5 tokens while benefiting from others' contributions.

Given the announcements show others contributing 2 tokens total, the public pool would be 2 + my contribution. If I contribute 0, I keep 5 and get (2 × 1.5) / 3 = 1, totaling 6. If I contribute 5, I keep 0 and get (7 × 1.5) / 3 = 3.5, totaling 3.5. Contributing 0 maximizes my payout at 6 tokens.
